message:
security: Add SSRF prevention, header injection protection, and error logging

- Block http_fetch_full requests to private/internal networks (127.x, 10.x,
  192.168.x, 169.254.x/metadata, localhost, IPv6 loopback/ULA)
- Block non-HTTP(S) protocols in http_fetch_full
- Block tcp_connect to private/internal hosts
- Validate HTTP request headers for CRLF/null byte injection
- Log tcp_send errors instead of silently swallowing them
